tasks.title: Update domain ontology and PROJECT documentation
tasks.description: Document the new Site → Unit → Equipment model and Apr 2026 naming convention in ontology files and PROJECT.md
tasks.details: Update the domain ontology file to document the three-tier hierarchy (Site 2000 → Units 2006/2007/2008 → Equipment). Update PROJECT.md to align with ontology summary, describing the new asset structure with Site 2000 containing three process units. Include stable IDs mapping and naming conventions established in Apr 2026.
tasks.testStrategy: Verify ontology file contains complete hierarchy documentation. Confirm PROJECT.md accurately reflects the new structure and is consistent with ontology. Check that all stable IDs are documented correctly.

tasks.title: Update core data types and hierarchy structure in lib/data.ts
tasks.description: Modify the asset hierarchy data structure to support the new Site 2000 with three units, preserving stable equipment IDs
tasks.details: Update the site data structure to rename site-x to 'Site 2000'. Remove site-y completely. Create three new units: 'Unit 2006 - DCU' (id: unit-2006-dcu), 'Unit 2007 - HCU' (id: unit-2007-hcu), 'Unit 2008 - Hydrogen Unit' (id: unit-2008-h2). Move equipment-a, equipment-b, equipment-c to their respective units while preserving all existing tabs arrays and functional content.
tasks.testStrategy: Verify site-x displays as 'Site 2000'. Confirm site-y is completely removed. Test that all three units appear with correct names and IDs. Validate that equipment-a, equipment-b, equipment-c retain their original tabs arrays and functional content.

tasks.title: Add placeholder equipment with non-navigating behavior
tasks.description: Create placeholder equipment entries (Coker 02, Coker Furnace, HCU 02, SMR Catalyst Tubes) with isPlaceholder: true
tasks.details: Add placeholder equipment: 'Coker 02' and 'Coker Furnace' under Unit 2006 - DCU, 'HCU 02' under Unit 2007 - HCU, 'SMR Catalyst Tubes' under Unit 2008 - Hydrogen Unit. Set isPlaceholder: true for all. Ensure these appear as plain tree nodes without navigation functionality when clicked.
tasks.testStrategy: Verify all placeholder equipment appear in correct units. Test that clicking placeholder equipment does not change view or route. Confirm isPlaceholder flag is set correctly for all placeholder items.

tasks.title: Update equipment display names and parent unit assignments
tasks.description: Rename equipment to new display names while preserving stable IDs and all functional content
tasks.details: Rename equipment-a to 'Coker 01' under Unit 2006 - DCU, equipment-b to 'HCU 01' under Unit 2007 - HCU, equipment-c to 'SMR Pigtails' under Unit 2008 - Hydrogen Unit. Preserve all existing tabs arrays, Equipment Home behavior, Workspace published dashboards, and What-If scenarios. Only change display names and parent unit membership.
tasks.testStrategy: Navigate to each renamed equipment and verify all existing tabs are preserved. Test Equipment Home behavior remains unchanged. Confirm Workspace published dashboards and What-If scenarios work with equipment IDs, not old display strings.

tasks.title: Create unit resolution helper function
tasks.description: Implement helper function to resolve which unit contains a given equipmentId for navigation path defaults
tasks.details: Create a helper function that takes an equipmentId and returns the parent unit information. This should support navigation path resolution and be used throughout the application for consistent unit-equipment mapping. Function should handle equipment-a → unit-2006-dcu, equipment-b → unit-2007-hcu, equipment-c → unit-2008-h2.
tasks.testStrategy: Test helper function returns correct unit for each equipment ID. Verify function handles invalid equipment IDs gracefully. Test integration with navigation path resolution.

tasks.title: Update sidebar asset tree with placeholder click suppression
tasks.description: Modify sidebar to display new hierarchy and suppress navigation for placeholder equipment
tasks.details: Update sidebar asset tree to show Site 2000 with three child units and their equipment. Implement click suppression for placeholder equipment (isPlaceholder: true) so they appear as plain tree nodes without navigation. Maintain existing styling patterns for consistency.
tasks.testStrategy: Verify sidebar shows exactly one site 'Site 2000' with three units. Test that clicking functional equipment navigates correctly. Confirm placeholder equipment clicks do not trigger navigation or view changes.

tasks.title: Update Workspace seed dashboard string references
tasks.description: Update all Workspace seeded dashboards to use new equipment display names while preserving equipmentId references
tasks.details: Update lib/workspace-data.ts and related files to use new equipment display names in dashboard titles and labels. Preserve all equipmentId references to maintain dashboard functionality. Update eqByName mappings and display titles to reflect new naming convention.
tasks.testStrategy: Verify all seeded dashboards display new equipment names. Test that dashboard functionality remains intact with preserved equipmentId references. Confirm eqByName mappings work correctly with new names.

tasks.title: Update mock data tables and remove Site Y references
tasks.description: Clean up mock data tables to remove Site Y and Unit TFR.40 references while preserving other demo data
tasks.details: Remove all mock data rows that reference Site Y or Unit TFR.40. Preserve unrelated demo rows (e.g., 'Pipe a') unless they specifically depended on removed sites. Update any remaining mock data to reference the new unit structure where appropriate.
tasks.testStrategy: Verify no references to Site Y or Unit TFR.40 remain in mock data. Test that unrelated demo data is preserved. Confirm updated mock data references correct new unit IDs.

tasks.title: Update UserDocument plantId mapping to new unit IDs
tasks.description: Map UserDocument.plantId and similar fields to new unit IDs for documents scoped to units
tasks.details: Update document scoping to use new unit IDs. Map existing plantId references to appropriate unit IDs (unit-2006-dcu, unit-2007-hcu, unit-2008-h2). Ensure document filtering and scoping continues to work with the new unit structure.
tasks.testStrategy: Test document filtering works with new unit IDs. Verify documents are correctly scoped to their respective units. Confirm plantId mapping functions correctly for all document types.

tasks.title: Update Site Overview map regions and unit filters
tasks.description: Modify Site Overview to display three units instead of former Plant 1/Plant 2 and Unit TFR.40
tasks.details: Update Site Overview map regions to show the three new units. Replace filter dropdowns that previously listed Plant 1/Plant 2 and Unit TFR.40 with the new three-unit structure. Ensure map navigation and filtering work correctly with new unit hierarchy.
tasks.testStrategy: Verify Site Overview map shows three new units correctly. Test filter dropdowns contain only the new units. Confirm map navigation works with new unit structure.

tasks.title: Update What-If scenarios and labels
tasks.description: Update What-If scenario labels and references to use new asset naming convention
tasks.details: Update What-If scenario labels, descriptions, and any hardcoded references to use new equipment and unit names. Preserve all scenario functionality while updating user-visible strings. Ensure scenario equipment associations remain intact through stable IDs.
tasks.testStrategy: Test all What-If scenarios display new asset names correctly. Verify scenario functionality is preserved. Confirm equipment associations work through stable IDs rather than old display names.

tasks.title: Update AI features and snippets with new asset names
tasks.description: Replace old asset names in AI snippets, suggestions, and related features with new naming convention
tasks.details: Update AI feature strings, snippets, and any generated content to reference new asset names (Site 2000, Unit names, equipment names). Ensure AI suggestions and contextual help reflect the current asset hierarchy and naming.
tasks.testStrategy: Verify AI snippets use new asset names. Test AI suggestions reference correct current asset hierarchy. Confirm no old asset names appear in AI-generated content.

tasks.title: Update dashboard creation placeholders and constants
tasks.description: Replace old asset references in dashboard creation flows and home constants
tasks.details: Update create-dashboard placeholder text, home page constants, and any hardcoded asset references to use new naming convention. Ensure dashboard creation workflows reference current asset structure.
tasks.testStrategy: Test dashboard creation shows new asset names in placeholders. Verify home page constants display current asset names. Confirm all hardcoded references are updated.

tasks.title: Comprehensive string sweep and validation
tasks.description: Perform final sweep to ensure no old asset names remain in user-visible strings across the application
tasks.details: Conduct comprehensive search for any remaining references to old site names (Site Y), unit names (Unit CFR.101, Unit TFR.40), or old equipment names. Update change logs, deprecated dashboard card fallbacks, and any other user-visible strings. Verify complete migration to new naming convention.
tasks.testStrategy: Search codebase for old asset name references. Test all user-facing interfaces show only new asset names. Verify change logs and documentation reflect new naming. Confirm no old asset names appear in any user-visible context.

tasks.title: Inventory and document legacy equipment dashboard references
tasks.description: Perform comprehensive grep search to identify all references to legacy equipment dashboard components and entry points
tasks.details: Execute grep commands to find all occurrences of 'equipment', 'EquipmentDashboard', 'currentView: "equipment"', and legacy route '/equipment-dashboard/'. Document all entry points including sidebar links, header navigation, and direct route access. Create a comprehensive list of files and components that need modification or removal. This inventory will guide the subsequent cleanup tasks.
tasks.testStrategy: Verify grep results are complete by searching with multiple patterns. Cross-reference findings with codebase structure to ensure no references are missed.

tasks.title: Remove equipment currentView from store and types
tasks.description: Remove 'equipment' option from currentView union type in lib/store.ts and update related setters
tasks.details: In lib/store.ts, remove 'equipment' from the currentView union type definition. Remove or update any setCurrentView('equipment') calls found during inventory. Update TypeScript types to reflect the removal. Ensure no compilation errors are introduced by this change.
tasks.testStrategy: Run TypeScript compilation to verify no type errors. Search codebase for any remaining setCurrentView('equipment') calls and verify they are updated or removed.

tasks.title: Update app/page.tsx to remove equipment view handling
tasks.description: Remove currentView: 'equipment' handling from the main page component
tasks.details: In app/page.tsx, remove any conditional rendering logic that displays the equipment dashboard when currentView is 'equipment'. Remove imports related to EquipmentDashboard component. Ensure the page still renders correctly without the equipment view option.
tasks.testStrategy: Test that the main page loads without errors. Verify that no equipment dashboard view is accessible from the main page navigation.

tasks.title: Remove sidebar and header links to legacy equipment editor
tasks.description: Remove or update navigation links that open the legacy equipment dashboard editor
tasks.details: Identify and remove sidebar navigation items and header links that set currentView to 'equipment' or navigate to the legacy equipment dashboard. Update any remaining equipment-related navigation to redirect to the appropriate /dashboard routes instead.
tasks.testStrategy: Manual testing of all navigation elements to ensure no links lead to the legacy equipment editor. Verify that equipment-related navigation properly redirects to the new dashboard editor.

tasks.title: Update Equipment Home edit links to use DashboardEditor
tasks.description: Modify Equipment Home edit functionality to deep-link to /dashboard/dashboard/[id]/edit
tasks.details: Update Equipment Home component to generate edit links that navigate to /dashboard/dashboard/[dashboardId]/edit with correct WorkspaceDashboard.id. Include optional equipment pre-filter parameters in the URL. Ensure the transition maintains context and user expectations.
tasks.testStrategy: Test editing from Equipment Home leads to the correct dashboard editor with proper ID and pre-filters applied. Verify the editing experience is seamless.

tasks.title: Update Site/Plant stack edit links to use DashboardEditor
tasks.description: Modify Site/Plant stack components to link to the unified dashboard editor
tasks.details: Update Site/Plant stack components to generate edit links pointing to /dashboard or /dashboard/dashboard/[id]/edit with appropriate WorkspaceDashboard.id. Maintain any equipment-specific filtering or context that was previously available in the legacy editor.
tasks.testStrategy: Test editing from Site/Plant stacks navigates to correct dashboard editor. Verify that equipment context and filtering is preserved in the new editor.

tasks.title: Update Dashboard card edit links to use DashboardEditor
tasks.description: Ensure Dashboard cards properly link to the unified dashboard editor
tasks.details: Review and update Dashboard card components to ensure edit functionality uses /dashboard/dashboard/[id]/edit routes. Verify that the correct WorkspaceDashboard.id is passed and that any equipment pre-filtering is maintained.
tasks.testStrategy: Test editing from Dashboard cards opens the correct editor with proper dashboard ID. Verify no broken edit links remain.

tasks.title: Remove or redirect legacy full-screen equipment route
tasks.description: Handle the legacy full-screen route app/equipment-dashboard/[equipmentId]/[tag]/full/page.tsx
tasks.details: Either delete app/equipment-dashboard/[equipmentId]/[tag]/full/page.tsx or implement a 301 redirect to /dashboards/[id]/full using getWorkspaceDashboardIdForTag from lib/workspace-data.ts. If the route is unused, prefer deletion. If still needed, implement proper redirection logic.
tasks.testStrategy: Test that legacy full-screen URLs either return 404 (if deleted) or properly redirect to the new dashboard full-screen view. Verify no broken links to the legacy route exist.

tasks.title: Ensure data persistence uses WorkspaceDashboard.widgets only
tasks.description: Verify all layout persistence goes through saveDashboardWidgets and WorkspaceDashboard.widgets
tasks.details: Audit the codebase to ensure no features depend on local-only grids or customDashboardCards from equipment-dashboard.tsx for authoring. Verify that all layout changes are persisted through saveDashboardWidgets and stored in WorkspaceDashboard.widgets. Remove any parallel persistence mechanisms.
tasks.testStrategy: Test that dashboard edits are properly saved and persist across sessions. Verify that no local-only state is used for layout persistence.

tasks.title: Handle default layouts through Dashboard module only
tasks.description: Ensure default layouts use DEFAULT_GRIDS/buildDefaultGrid only in seed or explicit reset functionality
tasks.details: If any flow still needs default layouts, ensure they use DEFAULT_GRIDS or buildDefaultGrid only in seed data or explicit 'reset layout' functionality within the Dashboard module. Remove any parallel default layout generation in the legacy equipment dashboard.
tasks.testStrategy: Test that default layouts are properly generated when needed. Verify that there's no duplicate default layout logic between old and new systems.

tasks.title: Delete equipment-dashboard.tsx component
tasks.description: Remove the legacy equipment dashboard component file
tasks.details: Delete components/views/equipment-dashboard.tsx entirely. If a minimal read-only placeholder is needed for transition, create a simple component that redirects to /dashboard, but prefer complete deletion. Update any imports that reference this component.
tasks.testStrategy: Verify the file is deleted and no imports reference the removed component. Run build to ensure no compilation errors from missing imports.

tasks.title: Reorganize shared utilities and clean imports
tasks.description: Move shared utilities to neutral paths and clean up import statements
tasks.details: Keep components/views/equipment-dashboard/layouts.ts and widget-view-resolver.tsx as shared utilities. If imports become messy after component deletion, move these to a neutral path like components/dashboard/. Update all import statements throughout the codebase to reference the new locations.
tasks.testStrategy: Verify all imports are resolved correctly after reorganization. Run build to ensure no import errors. Test that shared utilities function correctly in their new locations.

tasks.title: Final cleanup and comprehensive testing
tasks.description: Perform final grep search, manual QA, and fix any remaining issues
tasks.details: Execute comprehensive grep search to verify no user-facing paths to EquipmentDashboard or currentView: equipment remain for editing. Perform manual QA: create dashboard in Dashboard module, edit widgets, save, open Equipment Home popup and verify layout matches. Test read-only popups, full viewer, and cross-tab presence for regressions. Fix any linting issues.
tasks.testStrategy: Complete manual testing workflow: dashboard creation → editing → saving → Equipment Home popup verification. Verify no regressions in read-only functionality. Confirm build passes with no errors or warnings.

tasks.title: Update documentation and audit trail
tasks.description: Add implementation notes to documentation and create audit trail
tasks.details: Add a one-line note in AUDIT.md documenting the removal of the legacy equipment dashboard editor. Verify that domain.ontology.yaml and PROJECT.md are still accurate after the implementation. Document any architectural decisions made during the cleanup process.
tasks.testStrategy: Review documentation for accuracy and completeness. Verify that the audit trail properly documents the changes made to the codebase architecture.

tasks.title: Define Equipment Type Domain Model
tasks.description: Create the core domain model for Equipment types and their association with knowledge packs
tasks.details: Implement Equipment model with equipmentType string field. Create EquipmentKnowledgePack model with version, equipmentType, and metadata fields. Establish one-to-one relationship between Equipment and equipment type for catalog resolution. Use TypeScript interfaces and Zod schemas for validation.
tasks.testStrategy: Unit tests for model validation, relationship constraints, and type safety. Integration tests for equipment type resolution.

tasks.title: Create ParameterFamily Data Model
tasks.description: Implement ParameterFamily storage with stable identifiers and categorization
tasks.details: Create ParameterFamily model with: stable string id, displayName, category enum (Asset Information, Asset Efficiency, Event Visualization, Other), dataContract metadata. Implement CRUD operations and validation. Use Prisma schema or equivalent ORM.
tasks.testStrategy: Unit tests for model validation, category constraints, and stable ID uniqueness. Database integration tests for CRUD operations.

tasks.title: Create WidgetTemplate Data Model
tasks.description: Implement WidgetTemplate storage with template definitions and constraints
tasks.details: Create WidgetTemplate model with: stable string id, displayName, thumbnailRef, defaultWidth/Height, minWidth/Height, kind enum (kpi_card, time_series, gauge, etc.), parameterFamilyId foreign key, optionSchema JSON field. Implement validation for grid constraints.
tasks.testStrategy: Unit tests for template validation, size constraints, and kind enum validation. Integration tests for parameter family relationships.

tasks.title: Implement Dashboard Widget Instance Model
tasks.description: Create data model for persisting dashboard widget instances with pack versioning
tasks.details: Extend WorkspaceDashboard.widgets to store: templateId, x, y, w, h, minW, minH, userTitleOverride, optionValues JSON, packVersion. Implement Zustand store updates and persistence. Add migration logic for legacy viewType records.
tasks.testStrategy: Unit tests for widget instance validation and pack version tracking. Integration tests for Zustand persistence and legacy migration.

tasks.title: Create ParameterRequest Data Model
tasks.description: Implement parameter request system for user submissions to product team
tasks.details: Create ParameterRequest model with: id, requesterUserId, equipmentId, status enum (submitted, acknowledged, closed), bodyText, createdAt, updatedAt. Implement CRUD operations and status transitions. Add 24-month retention policy.
tasks.testStrategy: Unit tests for request validation and status transitions. Integration tests for retention policy and user association.

tasks.title: Seed Coker v1 Knowledge Pack Data
tasks.description: Create initial Coker equipment type with parameter families and widget templates
tasks.details: Create seed data for Coker v1 pack including all required parameter families and widget templates from FR-24 through FR-48. Implement data seeding script with version 1.0.0. Include mock equipment records for testing.
tasks.testStrategy: Integration tests for complete pack loading and template resolution. Validation tests for all required templates and parameter families.

tasks.title: Implement Coker Theme System
tasks.description: Create Coker reference theme with design tokens and styling
tasks.details: Implement Coker theme with CSS custom properties for colors, typography, card chrome, chart styling, and table zebra patterns. Create theme provider component and utility classes. Follow design system best practices with semantic color tokens.
tasks.testStrategy: Visual regression tests for theme application. Unit tests for theme token resolution and CSS custom property generation.

tasks.title: Create Widget Library UI Component
tasks.description: Build the widget library interface for browsing and adding templates
tasks.details: Create Widget Library component with category grouping, search functionality, template thumbnails, and drag-to-add capability. Filter templates by equipment type. Show add-on parameters when available. Implement responsive grid layout with template cards.
tasks.testStrategy: Component tests for filtering, search, and drag interactions. Integration tests for equipment type filtering and add-on display.

tasks.title: Implement Dashboard Context Bar
tasks.description: Create dashboard-level context controls for time range and cycle selection
tasks.details: Build context bar component with time range picker, cycle selector, and latest update display. Implement context state management in Zustand store. Apply context to widgets marked as follows_dashboard_context. Add validation for context compatibility.
tasks.testStrategy: Component tests for context controls and state management. Integration tests for context application to compatible widgets.

tasks.title: Create Base Widget Template Renderer
tasks.description: Implement core widget rendering system with template resolution
tasks.details: Create WidgetRenderer component that resolves templateId to appropriate renderer. Implement template registry pattern with dynamic imports. Handle loading states, error boundaries, and fallback rendering. Support option schema validation and application.
tasks.testStrategy: Unit tests for template resolution and option validation. Integration tests for renderer registration and error handling.

tasks.title: Implement KPI Card Template Renderer
tasks.description: Create KPI card widget template for single metric display
tasks.details: Build KPI card component with vertical accent bar, metric value, unit display, and title. Support customizable colors and formatting options. Implement responsive sizing and accessibility features. Follow Coker theme styling.
tasks.testStrategy: Component tests for metric display and formatting. Visual regression tests for theme compliance and responsive behavior.

tasks.title: Implement Time Series Chart Template Renderer
tasks.description: Create time series chart widget with multi-series support
tasks.details: Build time series component using Recharts with Y-axis labels, X-axis dates, legend with sensor tags, All/Invert actions, and pagination. Support dashboard context integration. Implement zoom and pan interactions. Handle large datasets efficiently.
tasks.testStrategy: Component tests for chart interactions and data handling. Integration tests for dashboard context application and pagination.

tasks.title: Implement Data Table Template Renderer
tasks.description: Create data table widget with sorting and pagination
tasks.details: Build data table component with column sorting, pagination, zebra striping, and responsive design. Support configurable columns and data formatting. Implement accessibility features with proper ARIA labels and keyboard navigation.
tasks.testStrategy: Component tests for sorting and pagination functionality. Accessibility tests for WCAG 2.1 AA compliance.

tasks.title: Implement Gauge Template Renderer
tasks.description: Create semicircular gauge widget for remaining life display
tasks.details: Build semicircular gauge component with colored bands, center value display, and configurable thresholds. Use SVG for crisp rendering at all sizes. Support animation and responsive scaling. Implement proper color accessibility.
tasks.testStrategy: Component tests for gauge rendering and threshold handling. Visual tests for SVG scaling and color accessibility.

tasks.title: Implement Heatmap 2D Template Renderer
tasks.description: Create 2D heatmap widget for elevation vs azimuth visualization
tasks.details: Build 2D heatmap component with configurable color scales, mode toggles (bulging, PSLF, ovality), and interactive tooltips. Use canvas or SVG for performance. Implement zoom and pan capabilities. Support colorblind-friendly palettes.
tasks.testStrategy: Component tests for heatmap rendering and mode switching. Performance tests for large datasets and interaction responsiveness.

tasks.title: Implement 3D Schematic Template Renderer
tasks.description: Create 3D equipment model viewer with segment coloring
tasks.details: Build 3D schematic component with segment-color legend, elevation markers, top-down orientation, and axis triad. Use Three.js or similar 3D library. Implement camera controls and responsive sizing. Support model loading and error states.
tasks.testStrategy: Component tests for 3D rendering and camera controls. Integration tests for model loading and error handling.

tasks.title: Implement Polar Plot Template Renderer
tasks.description: Create polar plot widget for displacement visualization
tasks.details: Build polar plot component with lateral and vertical readouts, grid lines, and data point markers. Use D3.js or Recharts polar coordinates. Support interactive tooltips and zoom functionality. Implement proper axis labeling.
tasks.testStrategy: Component tests for polar coordinate rendering and interactions. Visual tests for axis labeling and data point accuracy.

tasks.title: Implement FAD Chart Template Renderer
tasks.description: Create FAD curve chart with acceptable region visualization
tasks.details: Build FAD chart component with Lr vs Kr axes, acceptable region fill, FAD line, and current crack point marker. Use Recharts with custom shapes. Support interactive point selection and tooltip details. Implement proper engineering chart styling.
tasks.testStrategy: Component tests for FAD curve rendering and point interactions. Engineering validation tests for curve accuracy and region calculations.

tasks.title: Implement Multi-Tab Panel Template Renderer
tasks.description: Create tabbed panel widget for media content organization
tasks.details: Build tabbed panel component with Temperature, Displacement, and Stress tabs. Support placeholder content for missing images. Implement keyboard navigation and accessibility features. Handle dynamic tab content loading.
tasks.testStrategy: Component tests for tab switching and content loading. Accessibility tests for keyboard navigation and screen reader support.

tasks.title: Implement Unwrapped Map Template Renderer
tasks.description: Create unwrapped shell map widget for crack specification
tasks.details: Build unwrapped map component with section labels and selectable crack highlights. Use SVG for scalable rendering. Implement interactive selection and highlighting. Support zoom and pan for detailed inspection.
tasks.testStrategy: Component tests for map rendering and crack selection. Integration tests for highlight functionality and zoom interactions.

tasks.title: Implement Widget Option Inspector
tasks.description: Create UI for editing widget instance options and titles
tasks.details: Build option inspector panel with dynamic form generation based on template option schema. Support title override input, option validation, and real-time preview. Implement collapsible sections and responsive design.
tasks.testStrategy: Component tests for dynamic form generation and validation. Integration tests for option schema compliance and preview updates.

tasks.title: Implement Dashboard Grid System
tasks.description: Enhance dashboard editor with template-aware grid constraints
tasks.details: Extend existing grid system to enforce template min/max size constraints. Implement drag-from-library functionality with template size defaults. Add grid snapping and collision detection. Support responsive breakpoints.
tasks.testStrategy: Integration tests for grid constraints and drag interactions. Visual tests for grid snapping and collision handling.

tasks.title: Implement Parameter Request Form
tasks.description: Create form for users to submit parameter requests
tasks.details: Build parameter request form with description field, category selector, equipment reference, and submission handling. Implement form validation and success feedback. Add request to Widget Library interface. Handle authentication context.
tasks.testStrategy: Component tests for form validation and submission. Integration tests for request persistence and user feedback.

tasks.title: Implement Dashboard Duplication Feature
tasks.description: Create dashboard duplication functionality with data rebinding
tasks.details: Implement dashboard duplication with equipment type validation, layout copying, and data path rebinding. Create duplication UI with target equipment selection. Handle option values and title overrides. Validate equipment type compatibility.
tasks.testStrategy: Integration tests for duplication logic and data rebinding. Validation tests for equipment type constraints and error handling.

tasks.title: Create Product Team Parameter Request Queue
tasks.description: Build admin interface for managing parameter requests
tasks.details: Create admin interface for product team to view, acknowledge, and close parameter requests. Implement filtering, sorting, and status management. Add request details view and bulk actions. Secure with role-based access.
tasks.testStrategy: Component tests for admin interface functionality. Security tests for role-based access and data protection.

tasks.title: Implement Dashboard Read-Only Viewer
tasks.description: Create full-screen dashboard viewer for read-only access
tasks.details: Build full-screen dashboard viewer with same widget renderers as editor. Remove editing controls and add viewer-specific features. Support share links and responsive design. Implement proper loading states and error handling.
tasks.testStrategy: Integration tests for viewer functionality and widget rendering. Visual tests for full-screen layout and responsive behavior.

tasks.title: Implement PDF Export Functionality
tasks.description: Create PDF export with theme preservation and layout fidelity
tasks.details: Implement PDF export using browser print API or headless rendering. Create print stylesheets with Coker theme tokens. Ensure widget positioning accuracy within 2% tolerance. Remove app chrome from export. Handle large dashboards and pagination.
tasks.testStrategy: Visual regression tests for PDF output fidelity. Performance tests for large dashboard export. Cross-browser compatibility tests.

tasks.title: Implement Pack Version Management
tasks.description: Create system for handling knowledge pack versioning and compatibility
tasks.details: Implement pack version tracking and forward compatibility. Handle deprecated template IDs with mapping or incompatible notices. Create version migration utilities. Support semantic versioning for pack releases. Add version display in UI.
tasks.testStrategy: Integration tests for version compatibility and migration. Unit tests for version comparison and template mapping.

tasks.title: Create Mock Data System for Coker Templates
tasks.description: Implement comprehensive mock data for all Coker widget templates
tasks.details: Create mock data generators for all Coker template types. Implement realistic data patterns for time series, KPIs, tables, and visualizations. Support dashboard context integration. Create data binding hooks for template renderers.
tasks.testStrategy: Unit tests for mock data generation and consistency. Integration tests for data binding and context application.

tasks.title: Implement Widget Library Search and Filtering
tasks.description: Add search and filtering capabilities to widget library
tasks.details: Implement search functionality with template name and description matching. Add category filtering with multi-select support. Create search result highlighting and empty states. Support keyboard navigation and accessibility features.
tasks.testStrategy: Component tests for search and filtering logic. Accessibility tests for keyboard navigation and screen reader support.

tasks.title: Create Dashboard Validation and Error Handling
tasks.description: Implement comprehensive validation and error handling for dashboard operations
tasks.details: Create validation system for dashboard save operations, widget configurations, and template compatibility. Implement error boundaries and graceful degradation. Add user-friendly error messages and recovery suggestions. Handle network failures and data inconsistencies.
tasks.testStrategy: Unit tests for validation logic and error scenarios. Integration tests for error recovery and user experience.

tasks.title: Implement Accessibility Enhancements
tasks.description: Ensure WCAG 2.1 AA compliance across all dashboard components
tasks.details: Audit and enhance accessibility for all components. Implement proper ARIA labels, keyboard navigation, focus management, and color contrast. Add screen reader support for complex visualizations. Create accessibility testing utilities and documentation.
tasks.testStrategy: Automated accessibility testing with axe-core. Manual testing with screen readers. Color contrast validation and keyboard navigation tests.

tasks.title: Update domain ontology and project documentation
tasks.description: Update domain.ontology.yaml and PROJECT.md to define the Unit layer, placeholder equipment flag, and new Apr 28 2026 mock naming conventions
tasks.details: Modify domain.ontology.yaml to include Unit entity definition with properties like unitId, name, plantId. Add Equipment.unitId relationship and Equipment.isPlaceholder boolean flag. Update PROJECT.md to document the new Site → Plant → Unit → Equipment hierarchy, explain placeholder equipment behavior, and document the stable IDs (equipment-a, equipment-b, equipment-c). Include business rules for Unit-Equipment relationships and placeholder rendering logic.
tasks.testStrategy: Verify ontology schema validates correctly. Confirm documentation accurately reflects the new hierarchy structure and all entity relationships are properly defined.

tasks.title: Restructure mock data hierarchy in lib/data.ts
tasks.description: Restructure the mock data to implement Site → Plant → Unit → Equipment hierarchy, rename Site X to Site 2000, remove Site Y, and add new units and placeholder equipment
tasks.details:
Update lib/data.ts to:
- Rename primary site from 'Site X' to 'Site 2000' (keep stable id 'site-x')
- Remove 'Site Y' from mock data completely
- Add Unit entities: 'Unit 2006 - DCU', 'Unit 2007 - HCU', 'Unit 2008 - Hydrogen Unit'
- Rename equipment: 'Coke Drum' → 'Coker 01', 'HCU' → 'HCU 01', 'SMR Unit A' → 'SMR Pigtails'
- Add placeholder equipment with isPlaceholder: true flag: 'Coker 02', 'Coker Furnace', 'HCU 02', 'SMR Catalyst Tubes'
- Assign new stable IDs for placeholders (equipment-d, equipment-e, etc.)
- Maintain stable IDs for existing equipment (equipment-a, equipment-b, equipment-c)
tasks.testStrategy: Verify all sites, plants, units, and equipment are properly structured. Confirm Site Y is completely removed. Test that stable IDs are preserved for existing equipment and new IDs are assigned to placeholders.

tasks.title: Update TypeScript types for Unit layer
tasks.description: Add TypeScript interfaces and types to support the new Unit entity and Equipment.unitId relationship
tasks.details:
Create or update TypeScript interfaces:
- Add Unit interface with id, name, plantId, and equipment array
- Update Equipment interface to include unitId property and isPlaceholder boolean
- Update Plant interface to include units array
- Add navigation path types that include unitId if needed for currentPath/store
- Update any existing type guards or utility types that work with the hierarchy
tasks.testStrategy: Verify TypeScript compilation passes without errors. Test that all hierarchy navigation and data access patterns work with new types. Confirm type safety is maintained across the application.

tasks.title: Update workspace seed data and lookups
tasks.description: Modify workspace seed data to use new equipment display names while preserving existing dashboard content and stable ID bindings
tasks.details:
Update lib/workspace/seed.ts and lib/workspace-data.ts:
- Update eqByName lookups to use new display names: 'Coker 01', 'HCU 01', 'SMR Pigtails'
- Preserve all existing dashboard content, tab lists, and widget associations for equipment-a, equipment-b, equipment-c
- Ensure 'SMR Pigtail Integrity' dashboard name is maintained for equipment-c
- Update any hardcoded equipment name references in seed data
- Verify workspace published dashboards continue to resolve correctly with stable equipment IDs
tasks.testStrategy: Test that all existing dashboards load correctly with new equipment names. Verify What-If scenarios and seed data are preserved. Confirm workspace navigation resolves to correct equipment using stable IDs.

tasks.title: Update Asset module navigation tree UI
tasks.description: Modify the Asset module sidebar tree to display the new Site → Plant → Unit → Equipment hierarchy and handle placeholder equipment clicks
tasks.details:
Update Asset module navigation components:
- Modify tree rendering to show Unit level between Plant and Equipment
- Update equipment iteration from plant.equipment to unit traversal
- Implement placeholder equipment click handling (no-op, no navigation to Equipment Home)
- Ensure tree expansion/collapse works correctly with new hierarchy
- Update any plant.equipment direct iterations to traverse through units
- Add visual indicators or styling for placeholder equipment if needed
tasks.testStrategy: Manually test tree navigation shows correct hierarchy. Verify clicking placeholder equipment performs no navigation. Test that functional equipment still navigate to Equipment Home correctly. Confirm tree state management works with new structure.

tasks.title: Update site and plant overview components
tasks.description: Modify site-overview.tsx and plant-overview.tsx to aggregate equipment data across units and handle placeholder equipment appropriately
tasks.details:
Update overview components:
- Modify equipment iteration in site-overview.tsx to traverse units
- Update plant-overview.tsx to group equipment cards by units
- Exclude or zero out placeholder equipment in aggregations where appropriate
- Ensure performance remains O(n) over equipment count
- Update any equipment counting or status aggregation logic
- Maintain existing overview functionality while supporting new hierarchy
tasks.testStrategy: Test that site and plant overviews display correct equipment counts and aggregations. Verify placeholder equipment are handled appropriately in summaries. Confirm performance is not degraded with new hierarchy traversal.

tasks.title: Update Zustand store and navigation state
tasks.description: Modify the Zustand store to handle Unit-level navigation context and update currentPath logic if needed
tasks.details:
Update Zustand store:
- Evaluate if currentPath needs explicit unitId for navigation context
- Update navigation state management to handle Unit layer
- Ensure equipment navigation continues to work with stable IDs
- Update any path-based routing or state persistence
- Maintain backward compatibility with existing navigation patterns
- Consider flattening to equipment ID vs explicit unit context based on requirements
tasks.testStrategy: Test navigation state persistence across page reloads. Verify equipment navigation works correctly with new hierarchy. Test that URL-less navigation continues to resolve using stable equipment IDs.

tasks.title: Update global mock copy and constants
tasks.description: Update all hardcoded references to old site and equipment names throughout the application
tasks.details:
Update references across the application:
- home/constants: Update site and equipment name constants
- changeLog: Update historical entries to use new naming or rewrite for demo realism
- Documents and sync jobs: Update any hardcoded references
- WIS names and feature3-health-summary: Update equipment references
- Search through codebase for 'Site X', 'Coke Drum', 'SMR Unit A', etc.
- Update any tooltips, help text, or user-facing strings
tasks.testStrategy: Perform global search for old naming conventions to ensure complete migration. Test that all user-facing text displays new names correctly. Verify no broken references or inconsistent naming remains.

tasks.title: Implement placeholder equipment behavior
tasks.description: Implement the isPlaceholder flag handling to ensure placeholder equipment render in tree but don't navigate on click
tasks.details:
Implement placeholder equipment logic:
- Add isPlaceholder property handling in equipment rendering
- Implement click handler that prevents navigation for placeholder equipment
- Ensure placeholder equipment appear in tree structure but are non-functional
- Add appropriate styling or visual cues for placeholder items
- Verify currentView doesn't change to equipment-home when clicking placeholders
- Maintain tree selection state without triggering navigation
tasks.testStrategy: Manually test clicking each placeholder equipment (Coker 02, Coker Furnace, HCU 02, SMR Catalyst Tubes) performs no navigation. Verify they appear correctly in the tree structure. Confirm no Equipment Home or detail flows open on placeholder clicks.

tasks.title: Update Equipment Home and detail views
tasks.description: Ensure Equipment Home and related detail views work correctly with the new hierarchy and renamed equipment
tasks.details:
Update Equipment Home and detail components:
- Verify Equipment Home loads correctly for renamed equipment
- Update breadcrumb navigation to show Site → Plant → Unit → Equipment path
- Ensure all equipment tabs and content load with new names
- Update any hardcoded equipment references in detail views
- Verify equipment context is properly maintained in detail flows
- Test that stable equipment IDs continue to resolve correctly
tasks.testStrategy: Test Equipment Home for all three main equipment (Coker 01, HCU 01, SMR Pigtails). Verify all tabs, dashboards, and content load correctly. Test breadcrumb navigation shows correct hierarchy path. Confirm stable ID resolution works.

tasks.title: Update WIS View Data and global search
tasks.description: Update WIS View Data functionality and global search to work with new equipment names and hierarchy
tasks.details:
Update WIS and search functionality:
- Update WIS View Data to use new equipment names
- Modify global search indexing to include new equipment names
- Update search results to display new hierarchy path
- Ensure search continues to find equipment by stable IDs
- Update any search filters or categories that reference old names
- Verify WIS data associations remain intact with renamed equipment
tasks.testStrategy: Test global search finds equipment by new names. Verify WIS View Data displays correct equipment information. Test that search results show proper hierarchy context. Confirm WIS data integrity is maintained.

tasks.title: Regression testing and final validation
tasks.description: Perform comprehensive regression testing to ensure all functionality works correctly with the new hierarchy and no existing features are broken
tasks.details:
Comprehensive testing:
- Test all Asset module navigation flows
- Verify all equipment dashboards and tabs load correctly
- Test site/plant tab stacks work with new hierarchy
- Verify What-If scenarios continue to work
- Test workspace seed data and published dashboards
- Confirm placeholder equipment behavior is correct
- Test performance of hierarchy traversal
- Verify Site Y is completely removed from all interfaces
- Test that stable equipment IDs (equipment-a, equipment-b, equipment-c) resolve correctly
tasks.testStrategy: Execute manual test plan covering all major user flows. Verify success criteria from PRD are met. Test edge cases and error conditions. Confirm no regressions in existing functionality. Validate that all FR requirements are satisfied.

tasks.title: Update ontology documentation and project metadata
tasks.description: Update domain.ontology.yaml and PROJECT.md to document the new Unit entity, Equipment.unitId, and Equipment.isPlaceholder properties
tasks.details: Add Unit entity definition to domain.ontology.yaml with properties: id (string), name (string), plantId (string), equipment (Equipment[]). Update Equipment entity to include unitId (string) and isPlaceholder (boolean) properties. Document the new Site → Plant → Unit → Equipment hierarchy in PROJECT.md with examples of the three units: Unit 2006 - DCU, Unit 2007 - HCU, Unit 2008 - Hydrogen Unit.
tasks.testStrategy: Verify documentation completeness by reviewing ontology schema and PROJECT.md for accurate hierarchy representation and property definitions

tasks.title: Update TypeScript types for hierarchy restructure
tasks.description: Add TypeScript interfaces for Unit entity and update existing Site, Plant, and Equipment types to support the new hierarchy
tasks.details: Create Unit interface with id, name, plantId, and equipment array. Update Equipment interface to include unitId and isPlaceholder boolean. Modify Site and Plant interfaces to support units array. Ensure backward compatibility for existing equipment IDs (equipment-a, equipment-b, equipment-c).
tasks.testStrategy: Run `tsc --noEmit` to verify zero TypeScript compilation errors and validate type safety across the codebase

tasks.title: Restructure mock data hierarchy in lib/data.ts
tasks.description: Update the sites array to implement Site → Plant → Unit → Equipment hierarchy, rename Site X to Site 2000, and remove Site Y completely
tasks.details: Rename primary site from 'Site X' to 'Site 2000' while preserving site-x ID. Remove site-y and all child records. Create three units: Unit 2006 - DCU (contains equipment-a as Coker 01), Unit 2007 - HCU (contains equipment-b as HCU 01), Unit 2008 - Hydrogen Unit (contains equipment-c as SMR Pigtails). Preserve all existing tabs arrays and dashboard associations for the three main equipment.
tasks.testStrategy: Verify site-x ID preservation, complete removal of site-y references, and validate that equipment-a/b/c retain their stable IDs and content

tasks.title: Add placeholder equipment to mock data
tasks.description: Create placeholder equipment records (Coker 02, Coker Furnace, HCU 02, SMR Catalyst Tubes) with isPlaceholder: true and assign to appropriate units
tasks.details: Add equipment-d (Coker 02), equipment-e (Coker Furnace) to Unit 2006 - DCU; equipment-f (HCU 02) to Unit 2007 - HCU; equipment-g (SMR Catalyst Tubes) to Unit 2008 - Hydrogen Unit. Set isPlaceholder: true, provide minimal or empty tabs arrays, and ensure no published dashboards are associated.
tasks.testStrategy: Confirm placeholder equipment appear in correct units, have stable IDs, isPlaceholder flag set, and no dashboard associations

tasks.title: Update Zustand store for unit-level navigation
tasks.description: Modify navigation state management to support unit-level expansion and path tracking in the asset tree
tasks.details: Update currentPath state to handle Site → Plant → Unit → Equipment depth. Modify expansion state logic to track unit-level nodes. Ensure search functionality continues to work across the new hierarchy. Update navigation actions to support unit-level interactions while preserving existing equipment navigation for non-placeholder items.
tasks.testStrategy: Test navigation state persistence, expansion/collapse of unit nodes, and search functionality across the new hierarchy levels

tasks.title: Update Asset module sidebar/tree UI component
tasks.description: Modify the asset tree component to render the new Site → Plant → Unit → Equipment hierarchy with proper unit rows and equipment iteration
tasks.details: Update tree rendering logic to display units as intermediate nodes between plants and equipment. Implement unit row rendering with proper indentation and expansion controls. Ensure equipment rows render under their respective units. Handle placeholder equipment display (may include muted styling based on open questions).
tasks.testStrategy: Verify tree structure displays correctly, unit nodes expand/collapse properly, and all equipment appear under correct units

tasks.title: Implement placeholder equipment no-op navigation
tasks.description: Ensure clicking placeholder equipment performs no navigation and does not open Equipment Home
tasks.details: Add logic to check Equipment.isPlaceholder flag before navigation. For placeholder equipment, prevent currentView changes to equipment-home and maintain current navigation state. Ensure non-placeholder equipment (equipment-a, equipment-b, equipment-c) continue to navigate normally to Equipment Home.
tasks.testStrategy: Click placeholder equipment and verify no navigation occurs, then click real equipment to confirm normal navigation still works

tasks.title: Update workspace seed data and lookups
tasks.description: Update lib/workspace-data.ts and lib/workspace/seed.ts to use new equipment display names for name-based lookups
tasks.details: Update WorkspaceDashboard seed rows to reference 'Coker 01', 'HCU 01', and 'SMR Pigtails' instead of old names. Modify any equipment.name lookups to use new display names. Preserve equipmentId foreign key references (equipment-a, equipment-b, equipment-c) for dashboard associations. Update dashboard titles where equipment names appear.
tasks.testStrategy: Verify workspace dashboards display with correct equipment names and maintain proper associations with equipment IDs

tasks.title: Update site and plant overview aggregations
tasks.description: Modify overview components to flatten or iterate over units when aggregating equipment data, excluding placeholders
tasks.details: Update aggregation logic to traverse Site → Plant → Unit → Equipment hierarchy. Implement flattening function to collect equipment from all units. Exclude placeholder equipment (isPlaceholder: true) from aggregations. Maintain O(n) performance over equipment list. Update any summary statistics or counts to reflect the new structure.
tasks.testStrategy: Verify aggregations exclude placeholder equipment, performance remains O(n), and summary data reflects only real equipment

tasks.title: Update home constants and global mock data strings
tasks.description: Update components/views/home/constants.tsx, change logs, document metadata, and other global strings to use new display names
tasks.details: Perform comprehensive string replacement across constants files, mock data arrays, change log entries, document titles, and similar copy. Replace 'Site X' with 'Site 2000', old equipment names with 'Coker 01', 'HCU 01', 'SMR Pigtails'. Remove any references to 'Site Y'. Update path references to reflect new hierarchy.
tasks.testStrategy: Conduct project-wide string search to verify no stale references to old site or equipment names remain in user-visible content

tasks.title: Update Equipment Home and 3D routing
tasks.description: Ensure Equipment Home and 3D visualization routes continue to work with preserved equipment IDs while displaying new names
tasks.details: Verify equipment-3d.tsx and related routes continue to function with equipment-a, equipment-b, equipment-c IDs. Update any display names in Equipment Home headers, breadcrumbs, or titles to show 'Coker 01', 'HCU 01', 'SMR Pigtails'. Ensure routing logic remains unchanged for stable equipment IDs.
tasks.testStrategy: Navigate to Equipment Home for each of the three main equipment and verify correct display names appear while functionality remains intact

tasks.title: Update What-If and scenario management strings
tasks.description: Update scenario names, What-If associations, and related strings to use new equipment and site display names
tasks.details: Update scenario mock data to reference new equipment names. Modify What-If scenario associations to use updated display names while preserving equipment ID relationships. Update any scenario descriptions or titles that reference the old site or equipment names.
tasks.testStrategy: Verify What-If scenarios display with correct equipment names and maintain proper functional associations

tasks.title: Update global search and AI summary strings
tasks.description: Update search indexing and AI summary content to reflect new hierarchy and equipment names
tasks.details: Update search index to include new unit names and equipment display names. Modify AI summary generation to use updated names when referencing equipment or site information. Ensure search results show correct hierarchy paths with new naming convention.
tasks.testStrategy: Perform searches for equipment and verify results show new names and correct hierarchy paths in search results

tasks.title: Comprehensive regression testing and validation
tasks.description: Perform end-to-end testing of navigation, WIS compare-to-home, global search, and all affected features with new hierarchy
tasks.details: Test complete user workflows: asset tree navigation, equipment home access, workspace dashboard functionality, What-If scenarios, document search, and change log viewing. Verify no broken links or missing references. Confirm placeholder equipment behavior and real equipment functionality. Validate that all user-visible strings use new naming convention.
tasks.testStrategy: Execute comprehensive test scenarios covering all user paths, verify no regression in existing functionality, and confirm complete migration to new naming scheme
